external_references.description: CERT Polska. (2026, January 30). Energy Sector Incident  Report – 29 December. Retrieved April 22, 2026.

objects.description: During the [2025 Poland Wiper Attacks](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0063), the adversaries configured the FortiGate devices to send notifications to an attacker-controlled Slack channel.  During the [2025 Poland Wiper Attacks](https://attack.mitre.org/campaigns/C0063), the adversaries had also staged tools and files on services such as Dropbox and Pastebin.(Citation: CERT Polska)
